de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser

Class KeyIO.Loader

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeyIO.Loader
  • Enclosing class:
    KeyIO

    public class KeyIO.Loader
extends java.lang.Object
    Loading of complete KeY files into the given schema. Supports recursive loading, but does not provide support for Java and Java type informations.

    Little sister of ProblemInitializer.
